name: Chicken in Green Curry (Gang Keao Wan Gai)
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lbs Boneless chicken, sliced into 1-inch strips
About 1/4 cup Mint leaves, chopped or about 1/4 cup Oriental Basil leaves
2 Fresh green chili peppers, seeded and thinly sliced on the diagonal.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat 1/4 cup coconut milk with the green curry paste. Stir until well blended and a thin coat of oil appears on the surface.
2. Add the chicken and continue cooking over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Stir in the remaining coconut milk and the bamboo shoots, fish sauce, and sugar. Cover and simmer for 8-10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
4. Remove the cover and stir in the mint leaves and chili peppers. Cook, stirring for an additional 3-5 minutes.
5. Serve with rice.
